report.title: Login form submits with empty password field
report.description: When a user leaves the password field blank and clicks the submit button, the form submits without any validation error. The server returns a 200 response instead of rejecting the empty credential.
report.steps:
1. Navigate to /login
2. Enter a valid username in the username field
3. Leave the password field empty
4. Click the Submit button
5. Observe: the form submits and no validation error is shown

target.description: Missing client-side validation allows form submission with empty password field
target.expectedBehavior: An error message should appear when the password field is empty, preventing form submission
